remarks: Title: Rare South Wilton Gem: Build Your Dream Estate on 2 Pristine Acres  Discover the perfect canvas for your custom luxury home. Nestled within one of South Wilton's most desirable and established neighborhoods, this spectacular 2-acre wooded parcel offers the ultimate blend of serene privacy and everyday convenience. Held by the same family for generations, this rare offering provides a peaceful, quiet sanctuary just moments from the premier amenities, boutique shopping, and top-rated schools of Wilton.  Embrace the tranquil beauty of Fairfield County living in an area known for its magnificent estate homes. To ensure a seamless building process, the seller will provide a perk test prior to closing. Don't miss this extraordinary opportunity to design a legacy home tailored perfectly to your lifestyle.
